div.p: Memory usage over time showing allocation rate, free rate, and live bytes

text.tspan: // Linear regression on live_bytes over time

g.text: let sum_x: f64 = self.samples.iter().map(|s| s.time_ms as f64).sum();
let sum_y: f64 = self.samples.iter().map(|s| s.live_bytes as f64).sum();
let slope = (n * sum_xy - sum_x * sum_y) / (n * sum_xx - sum_x * sum_x);

text.tspan: // Linear regression on live_bytes over time

div.h1: HELP memory_live_bytes Current live allocation bytes

div.p: Trigger: net_growth > 1 KB/s for > 30s Indicates: Memory not being freed at expected rate
Trigger: live_bytes > 80% of limit Indicates: Approaching container memory limit, OOM kill imminent
Trigger: alloc_rate ≈ free_rate within 5% variance Indicates: Stable memory usage
